name: ProductLockup
description: Adobe product identity unit: app icon + product name label + optional caret. Used in RouterCard headers, RouterMarqueeItem, and anywhere a product name with icon is needed.

props.name: productName
props.description: Alias for label. Takes precedence when set.

props.name: styleVariant
props.description: label = default text treatment, eyebrow = smaller subdued style

props.name: showIconEnd
props.description: Shows caret in horizontal orientation only

props.name: iconSize
props.description: auto = size derived from orientation. Or explicit AppIcon size: xs/sm/md/lg/xl

props.name: caret
props.description: Custom caret template. null = no caret.

notes: The AppIcon inside is aria-hidden by default — the visible label provides the accessible name.
When used as a link or button header, the parent element should supply the accessible name for the interactive region.
